steps.t: Rísti Graver can be found at the Dáinlik in the Ironfold, while Aflur Smokebeard can be found at Hammerstead in the Ironfold. You should talk to Rísti…
Náin can be found in Járnfast. You should return to Náin.
Investigate the entrances to the mine within Járnfast.
Náin can be found in Járnfast. You should return to Náin.
